OneLineDescription: Tweaks and compatibility fixes for Container and Leveled Item loot records.
LongDescription: A collection of independently-toggleable tweaks and compatibility patches for Skyrim's Container and Leveled Item loot records. Currently includes: reverting 'Scarcity - Less Loot Mod' changes on boss-tagged Leveled Lists, stripping gold (and pure-gold leveled lists) out of Containers, and propagating the "Lock Related Loot" changes to the patch.
